## Meeting Purpose

[Catch up and explore potential collaboration opportunities between Marcel's AI-powered content agency and Sean's AI roleplay training platform.](https://fathom.video/share/E7yKoubpVsZWT8d3V3M3ci7Rb-W6yQWV?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel recently left DeepGram to start Rothax.ai, an AI-powered content agency with $1M ARR and 72% margins](https://fathom.video/share/E7yKoubpVsZWT8d3V3M3ci7Rb-W6yQWV?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)
  - [Sean raised $2M for Exec's new AI roleplay product for sales training, pivoting from their coaching business](https://fathom.video/share/E7yKoubpVsZWT8d3V3M3ci7Rb-W6yQWV?tab=summary&timestamp=22.0)
  - [Both are leveraging AI workflows (using tools like AirOps) to deliver high-value services efficiently](https://fathom.video/share/E7yKoubpVsZWT8d3V3M3ci7Rb-W6yQWV?tab=summary&timestamp=701.0)
  - [They identified several areas for potential collaboration and knowledge sharing](https://fathom.video/share/E7yKoubpVsZWT8d3V3M3ci7Rb-W6yQWV?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)

## Topics

### Marcel's New Venture: Rothax.ai

  - [Left DeepGram to start Rothax.ai, an AI-powered content agency](https://fathom.video/share/E7yKoubpVsZWT8d3V3M3ci7Rb-W6yQWV?tab=summary&timestamp=558.0)
  - [Achieved $1M ARR with 72% margins in just a few months](https://fathom.video/share/E7yKoubpVsZWT8d3V3M3ci7Rb-W6yQWV?tab=summary&timestamp=573.0)
  - [Using AI workflows to deliver high-quality content at scale (10x volume, 1/10th cost)](https://fathom.video/share/E7yKoubpVsZWT8d3V3M3ci7Rb-W6yQWV?tab=summary&timestamp=308.0)
  - [Clients include Reddit, RAM, Cajun, Firework, and other Series D companies](https://fathom.video/share/E7yKoubpVsZWT8d3V3M3ci7Rb-W6yQWV?tab=summary&timestamp=573.0)
  - [Offering workshops that lead to client acquisitions and team recruitment](https://fathom.video/share/E7yKoubpVsZWT8d3V3M3ci7Rb-W6yQWV?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

### Sean's AI Roleplay Platform

  - [Raised $2M for a new AI roleplay product focused on sales training](https://fathom.video/share/E7yKoubpVsZWT8d3V3M3ci7Rb-W6yQWV?tab=summary&timestamp=1663.0)
  - [Pivoting from their existing coaching business (Exec)](https://fathom.video/share/E7yKoubpVsZWT8d3V3M3ci7Rb-W6yQWV?tab=summary&timestamp=1588.0)
  - [Targeting CROs and revenue teams for faster sales cycles](https://fathom.video/share/E7yKoubpVsZWT8d3V3M3ci7Rb-W6yQWV?tab=summary&timestamp=1716.0)
  - [Competing with companies like Hyperbound, potentially Gong](https://fathom.video/share/E7yKoubpVsZWT8d3V3M3ci7Rb-W6yQWV?tab=summary&timestamp=1753.0)

### AI Workflow Tools and Challenges

  - [Both using AirOps for orchestrating AI workflows](https://fathom.video/share/E7yKoubpVsZWT8d3V3M3ci7Rb-W6yQWV?tab=summary&timestamp=1607.0)
  - [Facing scalability challenges as client base grows](https://fathom.video/share/E7yKoubpVsZWT8d3V3M3ci7Rb-W6yQWV?tab=summary&timestamp=1939.0)
  - [Exploring options for custom runtime layers or more robust orchestration solutions](https://fathom.video/share/E7yKoubpVsZWT8d3V3M3ci7Rb-W6yQWV?tab=summary&timestamp=1920.0)
  - [Sean offered to share lessons learned from their experience with workflow tools](https://fathom.video/share/E7yKoubpVsZWT8d3V3M3ci7Rb-W6yQWV?tab=summary&timestamp=1939.0)

### DeepGram's Voice AI Advancements

  - [Marcel shared insights on DeepGram's voice AI capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/E7yKoubpVsZWT8d3V3M3ci7Rb-W6yQWV?tab=summary&timestamp=2976.0)
  - [New voice agent API with improved interruption handling and end-of-thought detection](https://fathom.video/share/E7yKoubpVsZWT8d3V3M3ci7Rb-W6yQWV?tab=summary&timestamp=2905.0)
  - [Potential for Sean to leverage DeepGram's technology for Exec's AI roleplays](https://fathom.video/share/E7yKoubpVsZWT8d3V3M3ci7Rb-W6yQWV?tab=summary&timestamp=2902.0)

### Industry Trends and Opportunities

  - [Both see professional services as a major opportunity for AI disruption](https://fathom.video/share/E7yKoubpVsZWT8d3V3M3ci7Rb-W6yQWV?tab=summary&timestamp=626.0)
  - [Discussed the potential for AI-native services to capture significant market share](https://fathom.video/share/E7yKoubpVsZWT8d3V3M3ci7Rb-W6yQWV?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
  - [Explored the idea of building self-reinforcing ecosystems (content, workshops, products)](https://fathom.video/share/E7yKoubpVsZWT8d3V3M3ci7Rb-W6yQWV?tab=summary&timestamp=1162.0)

### Personal Updates and Networking

  - [Marcel shared personal updates, including the birth of his daughter and leaving a toxic work environment](https://fathom.video/share/E7yKoubpVsZWT8d3V3M3ci7Rb-W6yQWV?tab=summary&timestamp=202.0)
  - [Both expressed interest in ongoing collaboration and knowledge sharing](https://fathom.video/share/E7yKoubpVsZWT8d3V3M3ci7Rb-W6yQWV?tab=summary&timestamp=1525.0)
  - [Planned to meet at an upcoming AirOps dinner event](https://fathom.video/share/E7yKoubpVsZWT8d3V3M3ci7Rb-W6yQWV?tab=summary&timestamp=1461.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to send Sean an invite to the AirOps dinner event on October 8th](https://fathom.video/share/E7yKoubpVsZWT8d3V3M3ci7Rb-W6yQWV?tab=summary&timestamp=2476.0)
  - [Marcel to create a Slack connect channel for ongoing communication](https://fathom.video/share/E7yKoubpVsZWT8d3V3M3ci7Rb-W6yQWV?tab=summary&timestamp=2028.0)
  - [Marcel to introduce Sean to Anatoly (VP of Product at DeepGram) for potential early access to new features](https://fathom.video/share/E7yKoubpVsZWT8d3V3M3ci7Rb-W6yQWV?tab=summary&timestamp=2802.0)
  - [Sean to explore using DeepGram's voice agent API for Exec's AI roleplay product](https://fathom.video/share/E7yKoubpVsZWT8d3V3M3ci7Rb-W6yQWV?tab=summary&timestamp=2902.0)
  - [Both to consider potential advisory roles or formal collaboration between their companies](https://fathom.video/share/E7yKoubpVsZWT8d3V3M3ci7Rb-W6yQWV?tab=summary&timestamp=1544.0)
  - [Marcel to share information about potential office spaces in San Francisco for Sean's team](https://fathom.video/share/E7yKoubpVsZWT8d3V3M3ci7Rb-W6yQWV?tab=summary&timestamp=3172.0)
